seoTitle: Hazelwood vs Hazelwood North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hazelwood and Hazelwood North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hazelwood vs Hazelwood North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hazelwood and Hazelwood North.
heading: Hazelwood vs Hazelwood North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hazelwood, Victoria and Hazelwood North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hazelwood North has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hazelwood (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hazelwood or Hazelwood North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hazelwood has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Hazelwood North scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hazelwood scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Hazelwood North scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hazelwood or Hazelwood North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hazelwood North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
